description: A small negation/control family adapted from the SELF-GROUND task bank.

variants.label: negated
variants.prompt: The movie was not positive. The movie was

variants.label: paraphrased_negation
variants.prompt: The movie wasn't positive. The movie was

variants.label: non_negated_control
variants.prompt: The movie was positive. The movie was

variants.label: neutral_decoy
variants.prompt: The movie was often positive. The movie was
